name: pause
description: Pause or resume a task schedule (by `schedule_id` from `task_list`). Use this when the user asks to pause, unpause, resume, stop, or cancel a task.

schedule_id.description: The ID of the schedule to pause/resume

is_enabled.description: Set to true to RESUME/UNPAUSE (enable the schedule), set to false to PAUSE (disable the schedule). This controls whether the schedule is active, NOT whether to perform a pause action.
